zh.lifeSummary: 當Maude Mandeville於1138年出生在英國維爾爾時，她的父親Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex40歲，母親Rohese de Vere28歲。她和Piers de Lutegareshale至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1185年在英國艾可普萊享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maude Mandeville于1138年出生在英国維爾爾时，她的父亲Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex40岁，母亲Rohese de Vere28岁。她和Piers de Lutegareshale至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1185年在英国艾可普萊享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mandeville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Armand, Gabrielle, Camille, Emile, Fernand, Fernande, Gaston, Jean-Paul, Lucien, Michel.

French: habitational name from Mandeville, the name of two places in Normandy, derived from Latin magna villa ‘large estate’, or a variant of Manneville, a habitational name from Manneville, the name of several places in Normandy (see 2 below). Compare Montville and Monville .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Manneville (Seine-Maritime, Calvados), Manneville-sur-Risle (Eure), or Magneville (Manche).

variants.name: Mansfield
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire. The placename means ‘open land by the river Maun’, from the river name Maun (which may take its name from a hill named with Old English mamme ‘teat’) + Old English feld ‘open country’.
Irish (Waterford): when not an importation of 1, this is an altered form of the Norman name de Manville (see Mandeville 3).
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Mansfeld, a habitational name from a place so called in Saxony.

variants.name: Manderville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mandeville  .

variants.name: Manwell
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Mandeville  .

variants.name: Manville
meanings: English (Sussex and Lancashire): variant of   Mandeville  .
Altered form of   Mainville   1, a surname of Swiss French origin (see   Miville  ).
French: variant of Menville, a habitational name from Menville in Haute-Garonne, and also of Mainville 2.

variants.name: Mundell
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Mandeville  .
Americanized form of German Mündel (or some other similar, like-sounding surname): nickname for someone with a prominent mouth, from Middle High German munt, mündelīn ‘(little) mouth’.

variants.name: Monville
meanings: Altered form of French   Mandeville  .
Walloon: habitational name from Monville in Namur province in Wallonia (Belgium), of the same etymology as in 3 below.
In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Montville in Seine-Maritime or Monville in Calvados, both named with Old French mont ‘mountain, hill’ + ville ‘settlement’.

variants.name: Mandal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Chandi, Sanjay, Sankar, Somnath, Aditi, Aditya, Ajit, Amala, Amitabha, Anil, Anirudh, Aparna.
Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit maṇḍala, a word that has several meanings, including ‘sphere’ and ‘halo’.
English (Cumbria; of Norman origin): variant of   Mandeville  .

variants.name: Montville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Vernice.
Altered form of French   Mandeville  .
French: variant of   Monville  . This surname is very rare in France, found mainly in Creuse.

variants.name: Manfull
meanings: English (Midlands): probably a variant of   Mandeville  . Compare   Manville  .

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Maude Mandeville was born in 1138, in Wiltshire, England, her father, Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex, was 40 and her mother, Rohese de Vere, was 28. She had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Piers de Lutegareshale. She died in 1185, in Pleshy, Essex, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maude Mandeville est née en 1138, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Vere, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Piers de Lutegareshale. Elle est décédée en 1185, à Pleshy, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maude Mandeville 1138 in Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex 40 und ihre Mutter Rohese de Vere 28. Sie hatte mit Piers de Lutegareshale mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1185 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Pleshy, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maude Mandeville è nata il nel 1138 nel Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Rohese de Vere, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Piers de Lutegareshale. Morì nel 1185, nel Pleshy, Essex, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Pleshy, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスプレシュイ

ja.lifeSummary: Maude Mandevilleが1138年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essexは40歳，母Rohese de Vereは28歳であった。彼女はPiers de Lutegareshaleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1185年にイギリスエセックスプレシュイで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maude Mandeville(이)가 1138년 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de Vere(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Piers de Lutegareshale(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 영국 에세스 플레스히에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maude Mandeville nasceu em 1138, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Vere, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Piers de Lutegareshale. Ela faleceu em 1185, em Pleshy, Essex, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maude Mandeville родилась в 1138 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Vere, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Piers de Lutegareshale. Она умерла в 1185 г. в местности плеши, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maude Mandeville nació en 1138, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Mandeville 1st Earl of Essex, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Rohese de Vere, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Piers de Lutegareshale. Murió en 1185, en Pleshy, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
